item.title: She Was The Only Survivor Of Her Family...
item.description: A factual overview of Shasta Groene’s case, focusing on her survival, the investigation, and the events that brought national attention.

item.title: The Heartbreaking Case Of Gemma Hayter
item.description: A respectful overview of Gemma Hayter’s case, the investigation that followed, and the circumstances that led to answers, highlighting broader lessons around safety and accountability.

item.title: No One Believed Tracey Thurman — She Still Survived
item.description: Tracey Thurman sought help repeatedly, but her warnings were overlooked. Her case later led to legal changes that reshaped how authorities respond to domestic violence.

media:content.media:title: No One Believed Tracey Thurman — She Still Survived
media:content.media:description: Tracey Thurman sought help repeatedly, but her warnings were overlooked. Her case later led to legal changes that reshaped how authorities respond to domestic violence.
